reviews.comment:
Muy mal , cargamos $50.000 de nafta y como solicitamos factura A , no nos quisieron cargar los puntos en la tarjeta ypf !!! El día 11/4/26  a las 12.52 hs . UNA VERGUENZA !!!!

(Translated by Google)
Very bad! We filled up with $50,000 worth of gasoline and, because we requested an invoice (type A), they refused to credit the points to our YPF card! This happened on April 11, 2026, at 12:52 PM. A disgrace!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8700140572418264453/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xaVFNYUXdWRTgxYlVKTFkzQnNjMk5qWmxSZlJHYxAB

reviews.comment:
Hola acá de valle fértil, quiero destacar que es muy bueno estación de servicio, baños los mejores que encontramos en todas las vacaciones y la atención, abrazo grande para todos los chicos ahí y especialmente marcos 🫂

(Translated by Google)
Hello from Valle Fértil! I want to highlight that this is a very good gas station, the bathrooms are the best we found during our entire vacation, and the service is excellent. Big hug to all the guys there, and especially Marcos 🫂
